metadata.analysis_method: Multi-source: Helius RPC on-chain + Tokenomist + CryptoRank + Phemex + CoinLive + Dune Analytics
data_sources: Helius RPC on-chain treasury balance verification

buyback_wallet.label: Pump.fun: Pump Buy Back
buyback_wallet.function: Executes market purchases of PUMP tokens using platform fees

buyback_treasury.label: Pump.fun Squads Multisig (Buyback Treasury)
buyback_treasury.source_label: Dune Analytics + BubbleMaps (Squads Vault Coin 2 SOL4)
buyback_treasury.function: Consolidated storage of all bought-back PUMP tokens

staking_distribution.label: PUMP Staking Reward Distributor
staking_distribution.function: Distributes micro staking rewards to treasury and stakers
staking_distribution.notes: Sends small PUMP amounts (~6 PUMP/tx) to treasury at high frequency. Identified as staking rewards mechanism.

cumulative_buyback_totals.notes_on_discrepancy: CryptoRank/Phemex report 29.52% of 630B circulating = 186B PUMP. Tokenomist reports 16.60% of 590B = 97.9B PUMP. Treasury holds 103.96B. Tokenomist figure more consistent with treasury balance.
cumulative_buyback_totals.notes: Avg price estimate: $328M / 97.9B = ~$0.00335/PUMP. Treasury holds ~104B = most of the bought-back PUMP.

buyback_mechanism.funding_source: Platform fees: 1% flat swap fee on PumpSwap + bonding curve fees

execution_flow.step2: Buyback wallet sends SOL → treasury Squads vault (G8CcfRff)
execution_flow.step4: PUMP accumulates in treasury token account (HdtUyEC7TeLGrA7ddRRJWM6nUYk5UZsL9pJuWnXAFQ32)

token_distribution_of_buybacks.notes: Per AInvest Aug 2025 report. Treasury currently holds ~104B suggesting burn/distribution is pending or partial.

buyback_rate_trend.trend_note: Peak buyback pace in July 2025 ($2.2M/day). Moderate but consistent ~$1.2-1.3M/day in March 2026.

on_chain_verification.technical_note: Buyback swaps executed via Squads vault (vaultTransactionExecute) transactions. Individual swap transactions accessible via Squads V4 program accounts, not via standard token transfer history of buyback wallet address. 3.07B PUMP traced directly from buyback wallet in July 2025; remaining ~97B accumulated via Squads vault mechanism after mechanism change.

market_significance.comparison: Highest buyback program among all Solana protocols (Yahoo Finance Dec 2025)
market_significance.price_support: Systematic removal of ~98B PUMP from market creates consistent buy pressure
